pageDescriptionBefore: Use our free tattoo tip calculator to instantly find the perfect tip for your tattoo artist. Enter your tattoo cost, choose a percentage, and get quick accurate results with no guesswork.
hintSessions: For large pieces booked across several appointments.
hintSplit: Divide the full cost + tip total among your group.
importantBody: Tipping customs vary by studio and country. This tool estimates amounts using standard percentage math—always confirm expectations with your artist or shop policy.
resultsSubtitle: Based on your tattoo cost and tip percentage
emptyHint: Enter tattoo cost and tip %, then click “Calculate tip” to see your breakdown here.
proTip1: 20% is the most common tip for a solid session; bump to 25–30% for difficult placements or exceptional artistry.
proTip2: Tip on the final session cost if your artist quotes a per-session rate rather than one flat project price.
proTip3: Cash tips often go directly to the artist—ask the front desk if you are unsure.
proTip4: For multi-session sleeves or back pieces, calculate each session separately or use the multi-session option above.
proTip5: If friends split the bill, divide the full total (tattoo + tip) evenly unless you agreed otherwise.
errCost: Enter a valid tattoo cost greater than $0.
errTip: Enter a valid tip percentage (0% or higher).
